data.title: 国际服妃咲实装特别视频
data.summary: Sensei, a special video message has arrived from Kisaki, the president of Genryumon! A message from
data.body:
Sensei, a special video message has arrived from Kisaki, the president of Genryumon!
A message from the president... You must check it out right away!

▶️https://youtube.com/shorts/JDakK73X4fw
